title: Cyber Security Consultant l Contract l up to $7K
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Review current security controls and recommend enhancements.
  • Support the operations team to ensure timely deliverables that is compliant to security requirements.
  • Monitor security alerts and events from various sources, including SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) systems, IDS/IPS (Intrusion Detection/Prevention Systems), firewalls, and other security tools.
  • Analyze security incidents to determine the root cause, impact, and severity.
  • Respond to security incidents by following established incident response procedures.
  • Work with 3rd –party to support forensic analysis and investigations to identify the extent of security breaches and recommend corrective actions.
  • Collaborate with IT and other departments to implement security measures and mitigate risks.
  • Maintain and update security documentation, including incident reports, playbooks, and standard operating procedures.
  • Prepare and deliver security reports, presentations, and recommendations to clients.
  • Provide ongoing support and guidance to clients on security-related matters

Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Computer Science or related field
  • Minimum 2 - 5 years of working experience in one of the security domains: Security and Risk Management, Asset Security, Security Architecture and Engineering, Communications and Network Security, Identity and Access Management, Security Assessment and Testing, Software Development Security.
  • Good to have experience in either AWS, Azure or Google Cloud Platform
  • Relevant implementation experience in enterprise security.
  • Experience with various virtualization technologies and multi-tenant, private and hybrid cloud environments.

Interested Applicants, please email your resume to rupa.kankariya@manpower.com.sg (R1441955), stating the position as the subject title in the email.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
